title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. didymocephalum
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. didymocephalum, also known as arrowhead hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Arrowhead hawk's beard can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
